storage._note: NEUTRAL BY DEFAULT. All data lives as plain .md / .json files inside this plugin folder (knowledge/philosophers/, journal/, config/). No Obsidian, no database, no account, no external app is required. This works on any machine, offline, and is the recommended default.

_mirrors_help: OPTIONAL. Mirror your data into a tool you already use, so it shows up there too. Leave [] for a fully self-contained setup. Each mirror = { type, target, sync: ["knowledge"|"journal"|"goals"] }. Supported type: 'obsidian' (requires the Obsidian MCP). The plugin folder always stays the source of truth; mirrors are one-way copies.
